elements.text: any(det and pron)一些，任何 anybody(pron)任何人 anyone (pron)任何人 anything (pron)任何事 anyway(adv)不管怎样 anywhere(adv) 任何地方 apartment(n)公寓，房间 apple(n)苹果 appointment(n)约会，预约 · an appointment with the doctor arm(n）手臂，袖子 (a)round (adv ＆ prep）大约，到处；在…周围 · to travel around (adv) · to sit around the table (prep) arrive(v) 到达 art(n)艺术 artist(n)艺术家 as(prep)当做 · as good as • as soon as possible • the same as ask(v)问，要求 assistant(n)助手，助理 as well 也，又 as well as  (除.之外)也,既...又 at (prep)在 atall完全，根本 • It doesn't matter at all. aunt(n)伯母,姑，婶,姨 autumn (n)秋季，秋天 away(adv) 远离，离开 · He's gone away. · It's two miles away.
